channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: Where the goblins came from
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (306 comments) · 🔥 Trending on HN (547 pts)

item.title: Copy Fail
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (347 comments) · 🔥 Trending on HN (929 pts)

item.title: Diffusion Templates: A Unified Plugin Framework for Controllable Diffusion
item.description: 📄 Featured on Hugging Face Daily Papers — Controllable diffusion methods have substantially expanded the practical utility of diffusion models, but they are typically developed as isolated, backbone-specific systems with incompatible training pipelines, parameter formats, and runtime hooks. This fragmentation makes it difficult to reuse ...

item.title: FASH-iCNN: Making Editorial Fashion Identity Inspectable Through Multimodal CNN Probing
item.description: 📄 Featured on Hugging Face Daily Papers — Fashion AI systems routinely encode the aesthetic logic of specific houses, editors, and historical moments without disclosing it. We present FASH-iCNN, a multimodal system trained on 87,547 Vogue runway images across 15 fashion houses spanning 1991-2024 that makes this cultural logic inspectable...

item.title: A Survey on LLM-based Conversational User Simulation
item.description: 📄 Featured on Hugging Face Daily Papers — User simulation has long played a vital role in computer science due to its potential to support a wide range of applications. Language, as the primary medium of human communication, forms the foundation of social interaction and behavior. Consequently, simulating conversational behavior has beco...

item.title: Turning the TIDE: Cross-Architecture Distillation for Diffusion Large Language Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL, cs.AI — Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer parallel decoding and bidirectional context, but state-of-the-art dLLMs require billions of parameters for competitive performance. While existing distillation methods for dLLMs reduce inference steps within a single architecture, none address cross-a...

item.title: ClawGym: A Scalable Framework for Building Effective Claw Agents
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL, cs.AI — Claw-style environments support multi-step workflows over local files, tools, and persistent workspace states. However, scalable development around these environments remains constrained by the absence of a systematic framework, especially one for synthesizing verifiable training data and integra...

item.title: Accelerating RL Post-Training Rollouts via System-Integrated Speculative Decoding
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.CL — RL post-training of frontier language models is increasingly bottlenecked by autoregressive rollout generation, making rollout acceleration a central systems challenge. Many existing efficiency methods improve throughput by changing the rollout or optimization regime, for example, through off-pol...

item.title: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — We present GLM-5V-Turbo, a step toward native foundation models for multimodal agents. As foundation models are increasingly deployed in real environments, agentic capability depends not only on language reasoning, but also on the ability to perceive, interpret, and act over heterogeneous context...

item.title: Unified 4D World Action Modeling from Video Priors with Asynchronous Denoising
item.description: 📄 New in cs.RO, cs.AI — We propose X-WAM, a Unified 4D World Model that unifies real-time robotic action execution and high-fidelity 4D world synthesis (video + 3D reconstruction) in a single framework, addressing the critical limitations of prior unified world models (e.g., UWM) that only model 2D pixel-space and fail ...

item.title: Budget-Constrained Causal Bandits: Bridging Uplift Modeling and Sequential Decision-Making
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (166 comments) — Treatment allocation under budget constraints is a central challenge in digital advertising: advertisers must decide which users to show ads to while spending a limited budget wisely. The standard approach follows a two-stage offline pipeline - first collect historical data to estimate heterogene...

item.title: Three-Step Nav: A Hierarchical Global-Local Planner for Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.RO — Breakthrough progress in vision-based navigation through unknown environments has been achieved by using multimodal large language models (MLLMs). These models can plan a sequence of motions by evaluating the current view at each time step against the task and goal given to the agent. However, cu...

item.title: KellerJordan / modded-nanogpt
item.description: ⭐ 27 stars today on GitHub — NanoGPT (124M) in 90 seconds

item.title: TauricResearch / TradingAgents
item.description: ⭐ 386 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 56.4k total stars — TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

item.title: ZhuLinsen / daily_stock_analysis
item.description: ⭐ 294 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 33.3k total stars — LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

item.title: AI for 5G RAN: The Ultimate Expert Guide 2026 | Apeksha Telecom
item.description: 🆕 New article — <div class="medium-feed-item"><p class="medium-feed-image"><a href="https://medium.com/@myapekshatelecom/ai-for-5g-ran-the-ultimate-expert-guide-2026-apeksha-telecom-2a59d35d5e1c?source=rss------machine_learning-5"><img src="https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1672/1*tqmkPJP629c4A6rbiudXyw.png" w...

item.description: ⭐ 57 stars today on GitHub · ⭐ 16.9k total stars — AirLLM 70B inference with single 4GB GPU
